name: PBI_1736268_IntelliTest_Combined
description: Combined test suites from IntelliTest Chat + Test Generation modules for PBI 1736268

tests.test_case: Check for NULL values in mandatory columns in staging table
tests.sql: SELECT * FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG WHERE SRC_STM_ID IS NULL OR DVP_ACCOUNT IS NULL OR SHARES IS NULL OR BUS_DY_FLAG IS NULL;

tests.test_case: Validate SRC_STM_ID transformation mapping
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT SRC_STM_ID FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG WHERE SRC_STM_ID NOT IN (29, 30, 71, 72);

tests.test_case: Validate SRC_STM_ID to TXN mapping in target table
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T.SRC_STM_ID FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG G JOIN CCAL_OWNER.TXN T ON G.SRC_STM_ID = T.SRC_STM_ID WHERE G.SRC_STM_ID NOT IN (29, 30, 71, 72);

tests.test_case: Check for duplicate records in TXN table
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_ID, COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN GROUP BY TXN_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

tests.test_case: Validate DVP_ACCOUNT mapping in TXN table
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT DVP_ACCOUNT FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE DVP_ACCOUNT NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT DVP_ACCOUNT FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG);

tests.test_case: Check for NULL values in APA mandatory columns
tests.sql: SELECT * FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA WHERE APA_TP IS NULL OR APA_SEC IS NULL;

tests.test_case: Validate APA_TP mapping in APA table
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT APA_TP FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA WHERE APA_TP NOT IN ('APASEC79', '11');

tests.test_case: Validate SHARES sign transformation
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT SHARES FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG WHERE SHARES < 0 AND SRC_STM_ID NOT IN (71, 72);

tests.test_case: Check for NULL values in FIP mandatory columns
tests.sql: SELECT * FROM CCAL_OWNER.FIP WHERE FIP_TP IS NULL OR FIP_SEC IS NULL;

tests.test_case: Validate BUS_DY_FLAG mapping in TXN table
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT BUS_DY_FLAG FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE BUS_DY_FLAG NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT BUS_DY_FLAG FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG);

tests.test_case: Validate CDSM_RULE_MAP REC_TP mapping
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT REC_TP FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE REC_TP NOT IN (7);

tests.test_case: Check for duplicate records in APA table
tests.sql: SELECT APA_ID, COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA GROUP BY APA_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

tests.test_case: Validate APA_TP mapping in staging table
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT APA_TP FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG WHERE APA_TP NOT IN ('APASEC79', '11');

tests.test_case: Validate TXN_RLTNP mapping for relationships
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT RELATIONSHIP_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP WHERE RELATIONSHIP_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT RELATIONSHIP_ID FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG);

tests.test_case: Check for NULL values in TXN_RLTNP mandatory columns
tests.sql: SELECT * FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP WHERE RELATIONSHIP_ID IS NULL OR TXN_ID IS NULL;

tests.test_case: Validate MNY_TXN_QUALFR mapping
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT QUALIFIER_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.MNY_TXN_QUALFR WHERE QUALIFIER_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT QUALIFIER_ID FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG);

tests.test_case: Check for NULL values in MNY_TXN_QUALFR mandatory columns
tests.sql: SELECT * FROM CCAL_OWNER.MNY_TXN_QUALFR WHERE QUALIFIER_ID IS NULL OR TXN_ID IS NULL;

tests.test_case: Validate CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP mapping
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT CIRD_PD FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE CIRD_PD NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT CIRD_PD FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG);

tests.test_case: Check for duplicate records in FIP table
tests.sql: SELECT FIP_ID, COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.FIP GROUP BY FIP_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

tests.test_case: Validate SHARES sign for MULBALMT and S10TFRS
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT SHARES FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG WHERE SHARES > 0 AND SRC_STM_ID IN (71, 72);

tests.test_case: Validate aggregate SHARES total in TXN table
tests.sql: SELECT SUM(SHARES) AS TOTAL_SHARES FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE SRC_STM_ID IN (29, 30, 71, 72);

tests.test_case: Validate aggregate SHARES total in staging table
tests.sql: SELECT SUM(SHARES) AS TOTAL_SHARES FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG WHERE SRC_STM_ID IN (29, 30, 71, 72);

tests.test_case: Validate TXN_ID uniqueness in TXN table
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_ID, COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN GROUP BY TXN_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

tests.test_case: Validate APA_ID uniqueness in APA table
tests.sql: SELECT APA_ID, COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA GROUP BY APA_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

tests.test_case: Validate FIP_ID uniqueness in FIP table
tests.sql: SELECT FIP_ID, COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.FIP GROUP BY FIP_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

tests.test_case: Validate RELATIONSHIP_ID uniqueness in TXN_RLTNP table
tests.sql: SELECT RELATIONSHIP_ID, COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP GROUP BY RELATIONSHIP_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

tests.test_case: Validate QUALIFIER_ID uniqueness in MNY_TXN_QUALFR table
tests.sql: SELECT QUALIFIER_ID, COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.MNY_TXN_QUALFR GROUP BY QUALIFIER_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

tests.test_case: Validate date format in BUS_DY_FLAG column
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT BUS_DY_FLAG FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG WHERE REGEXP_LIKE(BUS_DY_FLAG, '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$') = FALSE;

tests.test_case: Validate SHARES total consistency between staging and TXN table
tests.sql: SELECT (SELECT SUM(SHARES) FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG) AS STAGING_TOTAL, (SELECT SUM(SHARES) FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN) AS TARGET_TOTAL FROM DUAL;

tests.test_case: TC_031: Validate JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST against CDSM_RULE_MAP TRAILER values
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT TRAILER FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST WHERE TRAILER NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT TRAILER FROM CDSM_RULE_MAP);

tests.test_case: TC_032: Validate JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST against TRANS_TP_CODE values
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT TRANS_TP_CODE FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST WHERE TRANS_TP_CODE NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT TRANS_TP_CODE FROM CDSM_RULE_MAP);

tests.test_case: TC_033: Validate JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST against TRANS_SBTP_CODE values
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT TRANS_SBTP_CODE FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST WHERE TRANS_SBTP_CODE NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT TRANS_SBTP_CODE FROM CDSM_RULE_MAP);

tests.test_case: TC_034: Validate JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST against EXEC_SBTP_CODE values
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT EXEC_SBTP_CODE FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST WHERE EXEC_SBTP_CODE NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT EXEC_SBTP_CODE FROM CDSM_RULE_MAP);

tests.test_case: TC_035: Validate JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST against CNX_IND values
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT CNX_IND FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST WHERE CNX_IND NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT CNX_IND FROM CDSM_RULE_MAP);

tests.test_case: TC_036: Validate TXN_SRC_KEY uniqueness in TXN table
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_SRC_KEY, COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN GROUP BY TXN_SRC_KEY HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

tests.test_case: TC_037: Validate SRC_STM_CODE values in TXN table
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT SRC_STM_CODE FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE SRC_STM_CODE NOT IN ('S10REC', 'S10DEL', 'MULBALMT', 'S10TFRS');

tests.test_case: TC_038: Validate TXN_TP_CD values in TXN table
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT TXN_TP_CD FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE TXN_TP_CD NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT TXN_TP_CD FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG);

tests.test_case: TC_039: Validate TXN_SBTP_CD values in TXN table
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT TXN_SBTP_CD FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE TXN_SBTP_CD NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT TXN_SBTP_CD FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG);

tests.test_case: TC_040: Validate APA_TP_CD mapping in APA table
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT APA_TP_CD FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA WHERE APA_TP_CD NOT IN ('APASEC11', 'APASEC79');

tests.test_case: TC_041: Validate PD_ID mapping in APA table via CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT PD_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA WHERE PD_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT PD_ID FROM CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP);

tests.test_case: TC_042: Validate APA amount calculation by SHARES sign
tests.sql: SELECT APA_ID, SHARES, AMOUNT FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA WHERE (SHARES > 0 AND AMOUNT < 0) OR (SHARES < 0 AND AMOUNT > 0);

tests.test_case: TC_043: Validate FIP_STCCCALQ_STG population in FIP table
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT FIP_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.FIP WHERE FIP_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT FIP_ID FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG);

tests.test_case: TC_044: Validate FIP record existence in target table
tests.sql: SELECT * FROM CCAL_OWNER.FIP WHERE FIP_ID IS NULL;

tests.test_case: TC_045: Validate relationship pairs in TXN_RLTNP table
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_ID, RELATIONSHIP_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP WHERE TXN_ID IS NULL OR RELATIONSHIP_ID IS NULL;

tests.test_case: TC_046: Validate TXN_RLTNP_TP_CD values in TXN_RLTNP table
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT TXN_RLTNP_TP_CD FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP WHERE TXN_RLTNP_TP_CD NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT TXN_RLTNP_TP_CD FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG);

tests.test_case: TC_047: Validate MNY_TXN_QUALFR records matching CDSM_RULE_MAP REC_TP=7
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT QUALIFIER_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.MNY_TXN_QUALFR WHERE REC_TP <> 7;

tests.test_case: TC_048: Validate staging vs target record counts for TXN table
tests.sql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG) AS STAGING_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN) AS TARGET_COUNT FROM DUAL;

tests.test_case: TC_049: Validate staging vs target record counts for APA table
tests.sql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG) AS STAGING_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA) AS TARGET_COUNT FROM DUAL;

tests.test_case: TC_050: Validate staging vs target record counts for FIP table
tests.sql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG) AS STAGING_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.FIP) AS TARGET_COUNT FROM DUAL;

tests.test_case: TC_051: Validate no orphan TXN records without APA
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE TXN_ID NOT IN (SELECT TXN_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA);

tests.test_case: TC_052: Validate no NULL TXN_SRC_KEY in TXN table
tests.sql: SELECT * FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE TXN_SRC_KEY IS NULL;

tests.test_case: TC_053: Validate no orphan APA records without TXN
tests.sql: SELECT APA_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA WHERE TXN_ID NOT IN (SELECT TXN_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN);

tests.test_case: TC_054: Validate no NULL APA_TP_CD in APA table
tests.sql: SELECT * FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA WHERE APA_TP_CD IS NULL;

tests.test_case: TC_055: Validate no orphan FIP records without TXN
tests.sql: SELECT FIP_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.FIP WHERE TXN_ID NOT IN (SELECT TXN_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN);

tests.test_case: TC_056: Validate no NULL FIP_ID in FIP table
tests.sql: SELECT * FROM CCAL_OWNER.FIP WHERE FIP_ID IS NULL;

tests.test_case: TC_057: Validate no orphan TXN_RLTNP records without TXN
tests.sql: SELECT RELATIONSHIP_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP WHERE TXN_ID NOT IN (SELECT TXN_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN);

tests.test_case: TC_058: Validate no NULL RELATIONSHIP_ID in TXN_RLTNP table
tests.sql: SELECT * FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP WHERE RELATIONSHIP_ID IS NULL;

tests.test_case: TC_059: Validate no orphan MNY_TXN_QUALFR records without TXN
tests.sql: SELECT QUALIFIER_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.MNY_TXN_QUALFR WHERE TXN_ID NOT IN (SELECT TXN_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN);

tests.test_case: TC_060: Validate no NULL QUALIFIER_ID in MNY_TXN_QUALFR table
tests.sql: SELECT * FROM CCAL_OWNER.MNY_TXN_QUALFR WHERE QUALIFIER_ID IS NULL;

tests.name: Validate_SRC_STM_ID_Mapping
tests.description: Verify that SRC_STM_ID values from source map correctly to target values (29=S10REC, 30=S10DEL, 71=MULBALMT, 72=S10TFRS).
tests.source_query: SELECT DISTINCT SRC_STM_ID FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG WHERE SRC_STM_ID NOT IN (29, 30, 71, 72);
tests.target_query: SELECT DISTINCT TXN_TYPE FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE TXN_TYPE NOT IN ('S10REC', 'S10DEL', 'MULBALMT', 'S10TFRS');

tests.name: Validate_Trailer_Regex_Matching
tests.description: Ensure that trailer data in the source matches the regex rules defined in CDSM_RULE_MAP for REC_TP=7.
tests.source_query: SELECT DISTINCT TRAILER FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG WHERE REC_TP = 7 AND TRAILER NOT LIKE (SELECT TRAILER_REGEX FROM CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP WHERE REC_TP = 7);
tests.target_query: SELECT DISTINCT TRAILER FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE REC_TP = 7 AND TRAILER NOT LIKE (SELECT TRAILER_REGEX FROM CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP WHERE REC_TP = 7);

tests.name: Validate_DVP_Account_Logic
tests.description: Check that DVP account logic is applied correctly in the transformation.
tests.source_query: SELECT DISTINCT DVP_ACCOUNT FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG WHERE DVP_ACCOUNT IS NULL;
tests.target_query: SELECT DISTINCT DVP_ACCOUNT FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE DVP_ACCOUNT IS NULL;

tests.name: Validate_SHARES_Sign
tests.description: Ensure that SHARES column has the correct sign (positive/negative) based on business rules.
tests.source_query: SELECT SHARES FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG WHERE SHARES < 0;
tests.target_query: SELECT SHARES FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE SHARES < 0;

tests.name: Validate_BUS_DY_FLAG_Dates
tests.description: Ensure that BUS_DY_FLAG is set correctly based on DATE_DIM lookup.
tests.source_query: SELECT DISTINCT BUS_DY_FLAG FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG WHERE BUS_DY_FLAG IS NULL;
tests.target_query: SELECT DISTINCT BUS_DY_FLAG FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE BUS_DY_FLAG IS NULL;

tests.name: Validate_APA_TP_Mapping
tests.description: Verify that APA_TP values map correctly to APASEC79/APASEC11.
tests.source_query: SELECT DISTINCT APA_TP FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG WHERE APA_TP NOT IN ('APASEC79', 'APASEC11');
tests.target_query: SELECT DISTINCT APA_TP FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA WHERE APA_TP NOT IN ('APASEC79', 'APASEC11');

tests.name: Validate_Product_Lookup
tests.description: Ensure that product codes map correctly using CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.
tests.source_query: SELECT DISTINCT PRODUCT_CODE FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG WHERE PRODUCT_CODE NOT IN (SELECT PRODUCT_CODE FROM CCAL_OWNER.CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP);
tests.target_query: SELECT DISTINCT PRODUCT_CODE FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE PRODUCT_CODE NOT IN (SELECT PRODUCT_CODE FROM CCAL_OWNER.CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP);

tests.name: Validate_Classification_Lookups
tests.description: Verify that classification lookups (TXNSBTP, EXECSBTP, SRCPCSTP) are applied correctly.
tests.source_query: SELECT DISTINCT CLASSIFICATION FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG WHERE CLASSIFICATION NOT IN (SELECT CLASSIFICATION FROM CCAL_OWNER.CL_VAL_VW);
tests.target_query: SELECT DISTINCT CLASSIFICATION FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE CLASSIFICATION NOT IN (SELECT CLASSIFICATION FROM CCAL_OWNER.CL_VAL_VW);

tests.name: Validate_Aggregate_Totals
tests.description: Ensure that aggregate totals (e.g., SHARES, AMOUNT) match between source and target.
tests.source_query: SELECT SUM(SHARES) AS TOTAL_SHARES, SUM(AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG;
tests.target_query: SELECT SUM(SHARES) AS TOTAL_SHARES, SUM(AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN;

tests.name: Validate_Null_Values
tests.description: Check for NULL values in critical columns in the target tables.
tests.source_query: SELECT * FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG WHERE SRC_STM_ID IS NULL OR SHARES IS NULL OR AMOUNT IS NULL;
tests.target_query: SELECT * FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE TXN_TYPE IS NULL OR SHARES IS NULL OR AMOUNT IS NULL;

tests.name: Validate_Grain_Duplicates
tests.description: Ensure that there are no duplicate keys in the target tables.
tests.source_query: SELECT SRC_STM_ID, COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG GROUP BY SRC_STM_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
tests.target_query: SELECT TXN_ID, COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN GROUP BY TXN_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
